plan_history.intent_description: Elevated input_errors on R1 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 caused by duplex/autoneg mismatch: R1 autoneg enabled, R2 forced to 100Mbps half. Desired outcome: eliminate input errors by removing the duplex/autoneg mismatch.
plan_history.problem: Duplex/autonegotiation mismatch between R1 and R2 on GigabitEthernet0/0/1 producing elevated input_errors on R1.
plan_history.fix_summary: Reconfigure R2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 to enable autonegotiation and remove forced speed/duplex to match R1.

plan_history.intent_description: Elevated input_errors on R1 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 caused by duplex/autoneg mismatch: R1 autoneg enabled, R2 forced to 100Mbps half. Desired outcome: eliminate input errors by removing the duplex/autoneg mismatch.
plan_history.problem: Duplex/autonegotiation mismatch on link between R1 and R2 (R2 configured speed 100Mbps, duplex half, autoneg disabled) causing input_errors on GigabitEthernet0/0/1.
plan_history.fix_summary: On router2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1: enable autonegotiation and remove hard-coded speed and duplex settings so both ends negotiate link parameters.

remaining_issues: R2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 still has speed forced to 100 Mbps and duplex set to half with autonegotiation disabled — the configured autoneg/duplex mismatch with R1 remains.
Input errors persist on the link (R1: 81, R2: 75), indicating the underlying duplex/negotiation problem has not been resolved.
Planned fix (enable negotiation.auto on R2 and remove hard-coded speed/duplex) was not applied or did not take effect based on the current running-config and interface status.

args.description: Enable autonegotiation; remove speed and duplex forcing (negotiation.auto=true, no speed 100, no duplex half)
